expectations.text: Detects and reads the existing PROGRESS.md file
expectations.evidence: The output PROGRESS.md references 'Resumed from checkpoint on 2026-03-06. Phases 1-3 were completed in a previous session.' showing the existing PROGRESS.md was detected and read.

expectations.text: Correctly identifies Phase 4 (Strategy) as the next incomplete phase
expectations.evidence: Phase 4 (Strategy) was correctly identified and executed. The PROGRESS.md notes state 'Phase 4 (Strategy) generated all five strategy documents' and all strategy files were created in the 02-strategy/ directory.

expectations.text: Generates strategy documents (lean-canvas.md, value-proposition.md, business-model.md, positioning.md, go-to-market.md)
expectations.evidence: All five strategy files exist in smart-parking-finder/02-strategy/: lean-canvas.md, value-proposition.md, business-model.md, positioning.md, and go-to-market.md. Each is substantive and well-structured.

expectations.text: Strategy content is coherent with the existing parking finder brief (IoT sensors, SF/LA market, freemium model)
expectations.evidence: All strategy documents consistently reference IoT sensors and camera feeds, SF and LA markets, freemium model at $9.99/month, B2B revenue share with garage operators, founder's Waymo background, and $50k savings — all matching the intake brief.

expectations.text: Updates PROGRESS.md to mark Phase 4 as completed
expectations.evidence: PROGRESS.md shows '- [x] Phase 4: Strategy — completed 2026-03-06' — updated from the original unchecked state.
